name: ProjectAxis

pricing_tiers.notes: Full feature set including time tracking, client portal, billing integration
Adds advanced resource management, custom onboarding, dedicated CSM

features: built-in time tracking with weekly timesheet submission and manager approval
client portal with deliverable commenting, approval workflow, and status updates
native Slack integration (bidirectional — task creation from Slack, notifications to channels)
resource capacity planning with utilisation heatmap
auto-updating Gantt chart (dependency changes propagate automatically)
VaultLedger and LedgerFlow native billing integration (project hours → invoice line items)
budget tracking per engagement with burn rate alerts
InsightDeck native connector for cross-project analytics
mobile app (iOS and Android, full time-tracking and approval features)
known_limitations: No built-in invoicing — billing integration requires VaultLedger or LedgerFlow
Resource capacity planning available on Professional tier but requires initial configuration (estimated 3hrs setup)
Client portal requires client to create a free ProjectAxis account
Gantt chart auto-update can be slow on projects with >200 tasks
notes: At 150 seats, Professional = £330/mo vs TaskBridge £290/mo. TaskBridge also pays ChronoLog £95/mo for time tracking. Net comparison: ProjectAxis £330 vs TaskBridge+ChronoLog £385 = £55/mo saving (£660/yr). Migration at 12hrs × £48 = £576, amortised £192/yr. Net direct saving = £468/yr — below £1,200 threshold. Operational gains: built-in time tracking (eliminates ChronoLog), client portal with approval (reduces billing disputes), native Slack (eliminates Zapier workaround), capacity planning (eliminates spreadsheet tracking), auto-updating Gantt. All 5 TaskBridge known issues directly addressed. Strong operational case for SWITCH — qualitative value of billing accuracy and client approval workflows is significant for a consulting firm.
